hooks.command: if [ -f claude-progress.txt ]; then echo '📋 === PROGRESS ==='; head -20 claude-progress.txt; fi && if [ -f feature_list.json ]; then echo '📊 === FEATURES ==='; python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open('feature_list.json')); s=d.get('summary',{}); print(f'Progress: {s.get(\"done\",0)}/{s.get(\"total\",0)} ({s.get(\"progress_pct\",0)}%)'); [print(f'  Next: {f[\"id\"]} - {f[\"name\"]}') for p in d.get('phases',[]) for f in p.get('features',[]) if not f.get('passes')][:3]" 2>/dev/null; fi
[ -f claude-progress.txt ] && cp claude-progress.txt claude-progress.txt.bak && echo 'Progress backed up before compaction' || true
